name: Jeon Jungkook | BAD DUO
description:
“i said: do you think you’d kill for me one day..?”

🚬🥃🌃

When a not so good girl moves schools and meets a very not good guy.

guess that makes them a bad duo.

.·:*¨༺ ༻¨*:·.

So you grew up in a not so good house, grew up with people who were not good influences on you. And now being a senior, you were honestly just an awful person. You didn’t talk to anyone except for certain people, didn’t care about school, fought, and did drugs… which it didn’t help that your parents did all sorts of shit, and didn’t really care much for you.

when you guys got evicted from your first shitty house, you moved to a way worse place, and that meant, a new fucking school.

and thats where you met a little group of people, and eventually where you met jungkook.

and putting those two together.. oh christ thats awful.

Hi i don’t have anything to say here except i love jungkooks hair during 3D era and i’m going to get that tattooed on my forehead so everyone can see it.
